code-with-quarkus_3/src/main/resources/M.general_idea: Remove the Quarkus-specific default landing page HTML and CSS to clean up the resources directory.
code-with-quarkus_3/src/main/resources/M.before:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>code-with-quarkus_3</title>
    <style>
        :root {
            --brand-color: #4695EB;
            --brand-color-dark: #056ac4;
        }
        html {
            font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #0D1C2C, #1A222F);
        }
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            color: #333;
        }
        .header-wrapper {
            background: url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,...') repeat-x, #0D1C2C;
        }
        ... [rest of CSS and HTML] ...
